{{Infobox group
| name = Redflower family
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

''See also: [[Redflower family Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The Redflower family is a prominent group within the [[Empire]] responsible for essential agricultural and environmental services. They utilize various [[Paths]] to manage food production and irrigation, even in regions where farming is typically impossible. Additionally, the [[Path of Jade Eyes]] allows members of the family to provide unmatched healing capabilities. Their influence is significant enough that the [[Skysworn]] protect them, as their loss would have severe consequences for the [[Empire]]'s food supply. The family maintains a major presence in the city of [[Stormrock]], which serves as their headquarters during emergencies. Their emblem is a red blossom, and members are often identified by this symbol on their clothing or equipment.}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The many [[Paths]] of the [[Redflower family]] grow food and bring rain throughout the [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1">''Blackflame'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Redflower family]] was untouched during the battle.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Redflower family]] has a presence in [[Stormrock]] and uses it as their family headquarters during emergencies.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10">''Skysworn'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Redflower family]] provides food and irrigation to the [[Blackflame Empire]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10" />}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The Redflower family is identified by their symbol of a red blossom and the crimson flower Goldsigns worn upon their chests. They are known for pulling mobile gardens and utilizing a burning wagon. Despite being under the control of the Lowgolds, the family eventually managed to escape.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Redflower family]] pulls mobile gardens.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Redflower family]]'s symbol is a red blossom.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9">''Underlord'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Members of the [[Redflower family]] wear Goldsigns with a crimson flower on their chests.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The Lowgolds stood over the [[Redflower family]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Redflower family]] has a burning wagon.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Redflower family]] got away.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
